ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., AAPL for Apple Inc.) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, index) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the instrument */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial instrument (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data (e.g., daily close) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument (accounting for splits and dividends) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the instrument */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price of the instrument */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  "volume_change_from_previous" INTEGER /* Absolute change in volume from the previous day */,
  "price_change_from_previous" REAL /* Absolute change in price from the previous close */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intraday_data" (
  "intraday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intraday data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the intraday data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument for the interval */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument for the interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument for the interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument for the interval */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded during the interval */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the intraday data (e.g., 1 minute, 5 minutes) */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the instrument for the interval */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price of the instrument for the interval */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous interval */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intraday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intraday_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Payment date */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the dividend */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-split date */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the split was announced */,
  "factor" INTEGER /* Split factor (e.g., 2 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio instrument entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the purchase price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the trade (including commission) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
